words.def: the state of owing something (especially money)
words.zh: n. 負債類, 債務（debt的複數形式）

words.def: the supreme effort one can make
a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used
words.zh: n. 日落, 同夥, 組合, 集合, 裝置

words.def: the money risked on a gamble
a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep
words.zh: n. 床, 睡眠處, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一層
